auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Baidu Qianfan API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in System Management > API Key: https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/qianfan/s/wmh8l6tnf

actions.name: cancel_batch
actions.description: Cancel a Baidu Qianfan batch prediction job by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a batch lookup action.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

endpoint.description: The endpoint executed by the batch.

completion_window.description: The completion window requested for the batch.

outputSchema.description: A Qianfan batch object.

actions.name: cancel_video_generation_task
actions.description: Cancel a Baidu Qianfan video generation task by its task identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a single video task action.

model.description: The video model identifier.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for a video generation task.

actions.name: create_ai_search_completion
actions.description: Create a non-streaming AI search chat completion with Baidu Qianfan.

model.description: The AI search model identifier to use.

role.description: The role of the message author.

name.description: The optional participant name for the message.

tool_call_id.description: The identifier of the tool call that this tool message responds to.

items.description: A tool call requested by the model.

tool_calls.description: The tool calls requested by an assistant message.

items.description: A message in a Qianfan chat-style request.

stream.description: Whether to request a streaming response. This connector only accepts false or omission.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Qianfan AI search chat completion action.

references.description: The search references returned by the API.

entities.description: The detected entities returned by the API.

followup_queries.description: The follow-up queries returned by the API.

usage.description: Usage information for the AI search request.

is_safe.description: Whether the response passed safety checks.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for the Qianfan AI search chat completion action.

actions.name: create_air_image_generation
actions.description: Generate images with the Baidu Qianfan MuseSteamer Air image endpoint.

model.description: The image model identifier to use.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate the image.

n.description: The number of images to generate.

seed.description: The random seed used for generation.

size.description: The output image size, for example 1024x1024.

response_format.description: The response format requested from the upstream API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for an image generation action.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the image was created.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for an image generation action.

actions.name: create_batch
actions.description: Create a Baidu Qianfan batch prediction job from an uploaded input file.

input_file_id.description: The input file identifier used by the batch.

endpoint.description: The endpoint executed for each batch item.

completion_window.description: The completion window requested for the batch.

replace.description: Whether an existing output should be replaced.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Qianfan batch.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

endpoint.description: The endpoint executed by the batch.

completion_window.description: The completion window requested for the batch.

outputSchema.description: A Qianfan batch object.

actions.name: create_chat_completion
actions.description: Create a non-streaming OpenAI-compatible chat completion with Baidu Qianfan.

model.description: The Qianfan model identifier to use.

role.description: The role of the message author.

name.description: The optional participant name for the message.

tool_call_id.description: The identifier of the tool call that this tool message responds to.

items.description: A tool call requested by the model.

tool_calls.description: The tool calls requested by an assistant message.

items.description: A message in a Qianfan chat-style request.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate.

frequency_penalty.description: The frequency penalty applied to repeated tokens.

presence_penalty.description: The presence penalty applied to newly introduced tokens.

stream.description: Whether to request a streaming response. This connector only accepts false or omission.

items.description: A tool available to the model.

tools.description: The tools available to the model.

tool_choice.description: How the model should choose tools.

user.description: An end-user identifier for tracing and abuse monitoring.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Qianfan chat completion action.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the completion was created.

model.description: The model that generated the completion.

prompt_tokens.description: The number of prompt tokens consumed.

completion_tokens.description: The number of completion tokens generated.

total_tokens.description: The total number of tokens consumed.

input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens consumed.

output_tokens.description: The number of output tokens generated.

usage.description: Token usage metadata returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for the chat completion action.

actions.name: create_completion
actions.description: Create a non-streaming fill-in-the-middle completion with Baidu Qianfan.

model.description: The Qianfan FIM model identifier to use.

prompt.description: The non-empty prefix text that the model should continue from.

suffix.description: The optional suffix text used for fill-in-the-middle completion.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate.

stop.description: Up to four stop sequences that stop generation.

stream.description: Whether to request a streaming response. This connector only accepts false or omission.

user_id.description: The end-user identifier for tracing requests.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Qianfan completion action.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the completion was created.

model.description: The model that generated the completion.

prompt_tokens.description: The number of prompt tokens consumed.

completion_tokens.description: The number of completion tokens generated.

total_tokens.description: The total number of tokens consumed.

input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens consumed.

output_tokens.description: The number of output tokens generated.

usage.description: Token usage metadata returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for a completion action.

actions.name: create_embeddings
actions.description: Generate embedding vectors for one or more input strings with Baidu Qianfan.

model.description: The embedding model identifier.

anyOf.description: A single input string to embed.
A list of input strings to embed.

input.description: One or more input strings to embed.

encoding_format.description: The output encoding format for embeddings.

user.description: An end-user identifier for tracing and abuse monitoring.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the embeddings action.

data.description: The list of embedding result items.

model.description: The embedding model used for the response.

prompt_tokens.description: The number of prompt tokens consumed.

completion_tokens.description: The number of completion tokens generated.

total_tokens.description: The total number of tokens consumed.

input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens consumed.

output_tokens.description: The number of output tokens generated.

usage.description: Token usage metadata returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for the embeddings action.

actions.name: create_image_generation
actions.description: Generate images with the Baidu Qianfan general image generation endpoint.

model.description: The image model identifier to use.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate the image.

n.description: The number of images to generate.

seed.description: The random seed used for generation.

size.description: The output image size, for example 1024x1024.

response_format.description: The response format requested from the upstream API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for an image generation action.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the image was created.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for an image generation action.

actions.name: create_response
actions.description: Create a non-streaming stored response with the Baidu Qianfan responses API.

model.description: The Qianfan model identifier to use.

input.description: The text or structured input items sent to the model.

instructions.description: An optional system instruction inserted before the input.

stream.description: Whether to request a streaming response. This connector only accepts false or omission.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Qianfan stored response.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

model.description: The model that produced the response.

prompt_tokens.description: The number of prompt tokens consumed.

completion_tokens.description: The number of completion tokens generated.

total_tokens.description: The total number of tokens consumed.

input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens consumed.

output_tokens.description: The number of output tokens generated.

usage.description: Token usage metadata returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response object returned by the Qianfan responses API.

actions.name: create_video_generation_task
actions.description: Create a Baidu Qianfan video generation task.

model.description: The video model identifier to use.

content.description: The ordered content items for generation.

duration.description: The requested video duration in seconds.

prompt_extend.description: Whether the upstream prompt extension feature should be enabled.

watermark.description: Whether a watermark should be added.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a video generation task.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for creating a video generation task.

actions.name: delete_response
actions.description: Delete a previously stored Baidu Qianfan response by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a response lookup action.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

deleted.description: Whether the response was deleted successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for deleting a stored response.

actions.name: get_batch
actions.description: Fetch a Baidu Qianfan batch prediction job by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a batch lookup action.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

endpoint.description: The endpoint executed by the batch.

completion_window.description: The completion window requested for the batch.

outputSchema.description: A Qianfan batch object.

actions.name: get_file_content
actions.description: Fetch the raw content of a Baidu Qianfan file by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a file lookup action.

content.description: The raw file content returned by the API.

content_type.description: The response content type returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: Action output.

actions.name: get_response
actions.description: Fetch a previously stored Baidu Qianfan response by its identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a response lookup action.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

model.description: The model that produced the response.

prompt_tokens.description: The number of prompt tokens consumed.

completion_tokens.description: The number of completion tokens generated.

total_tokens.description: The total number of tokens consumed.

input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens consumed.

output_tokens.description: The number of output tokens generated.

usage.description: Token usage metadata returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response object returned by the Qianfan responses API.

actions.name: get_video_generation_task
actions.description: Fetch a Baidu Qianfan video generation task by its task identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a single video task action.

model.description: The video model identifier.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for a video generation task.

actions.name: list_batches
actions.description: List Baidu Qianfan batch prediction jobs with optional pagination.

after.description: Return batches after this batch identifier.

limit.description: The maximum number of batches to return.

inputSchema.description: Action input.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.
The object type returned by the API.

endpoint.description: The endpoint executed by the batch.

completion_window.description: The completion window requested for the batch.

first_id.description: The first batch identifier in the page.

last_id.description: The last batch identifier in the page.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for listing Qianfan batches.

actions.name: list_files
actions.description: List files stored in Baidu Qianfan with optional filters.

after.description: Return files after this file identifier.

limit.description: The maximum number of files to return.

order.description: The order in which files should be returned.

inputSchema.description: Action input.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

purpose.description: The declared purpose of the file.

filename.description: The file name stored by the API.

created_at.description: The Unix timestamp when the file was created.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for listing Qianfan files.

actions.name: list_models
actions.description: List the models available to the current Baidu Qianfan API key.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

created.description: The Unix timestamp when the model metadata was created.

owned_by.description: The organization or owner that provides the model.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for listing Qianfan models.

actions.name: list_response_input_items
actions.description: List the stored context items for a previously created Baidu Qianfan response.

after.description: Return items after this item identifier.

before.description: Return items before this item identifier.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return.

order.description: The order in which input items should be returned.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing stored response input items.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

first_id.description: The first item identifier in the page.

last_id.description: The last item identifier in the page.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for listing stored response input items.

actions.name: list_video_generation_tasks
actions.description: List Baidu Qianfan video generation tasks with optional filters.

page_size.description: The number of tasks per page.

start_time.description: Filter tasks created after this time.

end_time.description: Filter tasks created before this time.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing video generation tasks.

total.description: The total number of matching tasks.

model.description: The video model identifier.

items.description: The response payload for a video generation task.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for listing video generation tasks.

actions.name: rerank
actions.description: Score and rank candidate documents against a query with a Baidu Qianfan rerank model.

model.description: The rerank model identifier.

query.description: The search query used to score the candidate documents.

documents.description: The ordered candidate documents to rank.

top_n.description: The maximum number of ranked documents to return.

return_documents.description: Whether to include the ranked document text in the response.

max_chunks_per_doc.description: The maximum number of chunks to evaluate per document.

user.description: An end-user identifier for tracing and abuse monitoring.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the rerank action.

model.description: The rerank model used for the response.

prompt_tokens.description: The number of prompt tokens consumed.

completion_tokens.description: The number of completion tokens generated.

total_tokens.description: The total number of tokens consumed.

input_tokens.description: The number of input tokens consumed.

output_tokens.description: The number of output tokens generated.

usage.description: Token usage metadata returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for the rerank action.

actions.name: run_paddleocr_vl
actions.description: Run the Baidu Qianfan PaddleOCR-VL endpoint on a document or image.

file.description: The image or document URL, or another upstream-supported file descriptor string.

model.description: The OCR model identifier.

fileType.description: The file type declared to the upstream API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Qianfan OCR action.

result.description: The OCR result returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for a Qianfan OCR action.

actions.name: run_pp_structure_v3
actions.description: Run the Baidu Qianfan PP-StructureV3 OCR endpoint on a document or image.

file.description: The image or document URL, or another upstream-supported file descriptor string.

model.description: The OCR model identifier.

fileType.description: The file type declared to the upstream API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Qianfan OCR action.

result.description: The OCR result returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response payload for a Qianfan OCR action.

actions.name: upload_file
actions.description: Upload a file to Baidu Qianfan for batch or other file-based APIs.

fileId.description: The transit file identifier returned by POST /api/files.

name.description: Optional filename override to send to the provider.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type override to send to the provider.

file.description: The file uploaded through POST /api/files to send to Qianfan.

purpose.description: The declared purpose of the uploaded file.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for uploading a Qianfan file.

object.description: The object type returned by the API.

purpose.description: The declared purpose of the file.

filename.description: The file name stored by the API.

created_at.description: The Unix timestamp when the file was created.

outputSchema.description: A Qianfan file object.
